de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.nodeviews

Class SequentViewInputListener

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.nodeviews.SequentViewInputListener
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    KeyListener, MouseListener, MouseMotionListener, EventListener

    public class SequentViewInputListener
extends Object
implements KeyListener, MouseMotionListener, MouseListener
    This class implements all input listener interfaces for SequentView.
    Author:
    Kai Wallisch
